creator: petef@databits.net
text:
0.8.2 is already out.


diff -ruN etherape.old/Makefile etherape/Makefile
--- etherape.old/Makefile	Sat Aug 11 01:17:17 2001
+++ etherape/Makefile	Mon Aug 13 01:15:52 2001
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	etherape
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.1
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.2
 CATEGORIES=	net gnome
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
diff -ruN etherape.old/distinfo etherape/distinfo
--- etherape.old/distinfo	Fri Aug 10 16:52:54 2001
+++ etherape/distinfo	Mon Aug 13 01:09:38 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (etherape-0.8.1.tar.gz) = bef9f3b1a21bcdae9ad1d5c3da6bd388
+MD5 (etherape-0.8.2.tar.gz) = 30244b1e4d24f7e1154d789002caa1e9

--
Pete Fritchman <petef@databits.net>
